text: She has long hair and she is tall.
Today she sits at a cafe and orders her food.

Would you like any dessert?
Good afternoon! Here is the menu. What would you like to drink?
I would like an orange juice, please. And I would like to order the grilled chicken.
Great choice. The chicken comes with rice and fresh vegetables. Would you like any dessert?
Yes, for dessert I would like the chocolate cake. It looks delicious.
Perfect. I will bring your dish soon. Enjoy your meal!
Thank you so much. And later, can I have the bill, please?
I would like to see the menu, please.
I would like the chicken and some vegetables.
What would you like to drink?
For dessert, I would like the chocolate cake.
Can I have the bill, please?

Good afternoon, and welcome to Cafe de Paris. Here is our special menu for today. To start, we have a fresh green salad or a bowl of warm onion soup. For the main course, you can choose the grilled chicken with rice, the pasta with tomato sauce, or the fish of the day with vegetables. We also have a vegetarian option, a cheese sandwich with a side of fries. For dessert, there is chocolate cake, fresh fruit, or vanilla ice cream. To drink, we have water, orange juice, coffee, and tea. Everything is fresh and made today. Please take your time, and tell me when you are ready to order. I would be happy to help you choose.

Today I had lunch at a small cafe near the hotel, and I ordered everything in English. First, the waiter gave me the menu and asked what I would like to drink. I said I would like an orange juice, please. Then I looked at the food. There was a lot of cheese and some fresh bread on the table. For my main course, I would like the grilled chicken with rice, and a small salad on the side. The waiter was very kind, and he brought my food quickly. For dessert, I had a slice of chocolate cake. It was delicious. At the end, I asked for the bill, and I said thank you. I felt so proud, because before I could not order in English, and now I can.
First, the waiter brings the menu. Next, you choose your food and drink. After that, you say what you would like to order. Then, the waiter brings your meal. Finally, you ask for the bill and pay.
